label_provenance.interpretation: The adversary battery label mirrors the model truth bucket used for the existing delayed-consequence/feature-proxy validation signal.
label_provenance.quote: truth_harm = clamp(... neighbor_harm_rate + extraction_rate + aid_interception_rate); truth.append(1 if truth_harm > 0.95 else 0)

metadata.metric: Maximum balanced accuracy over logistic regression, kNN, nearest-centroid, and decision-stump ensemble under leave-one-world-out evaluation.
metadata.mode: prospective; outcome unknown at lock time; decision citable under ANY outcome

outcome_branches.FAIL: Any classifier has held-out balanced accuracy >= 0.75; observable features carry sufficient statistics under this protocol.
outcome_branches.INCONCLUSIVE: At least one classifier is >0.60 and all are <0.75, or seed policy is inadmissible; publish as-is.
outcome_branches.PASS: All classifiers have held-out balanced accuracy <= 0.60; the tested blindness claim strengthens from one naive proxy to this battery.

metadata.question: Can a stdlib adversary battery recover exploitative zones from observable justitia features across held-out worlds?
metadata.what_was_not_shown: No result proves exploitative recovery impossible for all classifiers, feature sets, or worlds.
